entry.data:
CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS MORNING
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTH THIS AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
